articles.title: Here are the Mass. beaches closed Wednesday as temps hit the high 80s
articles.description:
The closed beaches are in Quincy, Ashby, Plymouth, and Shutesbury.

The post Here are the Mass. beaches closed Wednesday as temps hit the high 80s appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Quincy, Ashby, Plymouth, and Shutesbury beaches closed on Wednesday due to high temperatures.
Temperatures reached the high 80s, prompting safety concerns for beachgoers.
Local residents may need to seek alternative recreational areas during the heat.

articles.title: Stephen Colbert’s best ‘Late Show’ moments
articles.description:
As Colbert signs off after 11 years, here are five standout moments from his CBS late-night run.

summary: Stephen Colbert concludes 11 years on CBS's 'Late Show' on May 27, 2026.
Colbert's tenure included five standout moments that resonated with Boston audiences.
His departure may shift late-night viewing habits for local residents.

articles.title: Red Sox have had little to show for their ‘Hail Mary’ coaching change
articles.description:
"I want to see us win, just like you guys do, just like our fans do, and these guys are fighting."

The post Red Sox have had little to show for their ‘Hail Mary’ coaching change appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Red Sox coaching change has not improved team performance this season.
Chad Tracy is currently leading the team after Alex Cora's departure.
Fans express frustration as team struggles to secure wins in 2026.

articles.title: Home of the Week: For $625k, 14.6 acres of nature at the foothills of the Berkshires
articles.description:
This cabin-style home sits 1,500 feet above the Deerfield River Valley.

The post Home of the Week: For $625k, 14.6 acres of nature at the foothills of the Berkshires appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Explore a cabin-style home listed at $625,000 in Charlemont, MA.
Enjoy 14.6 acres of nature, located 1,500 feet above the Deerfield River Valley.
Potential for Boston residents seeking a serene getaway in the Berkshires.
